name: Balloons Creator Game
description: Balloons Creator is a free online puzzle game for boys played on PuzzleGame. You need to create colorful balls to make the glass fill up. Do not drop anything, you have only three chances. Try to find the best way to complete each level. The game has a simple mechanism. Just touch freely to complete levels! Mobile, Tablet, and Desktop are playable. Come join us and take the challenge!
tags: 3D, Android, Ballon, Boy, Brain, Fun, HTML5, Kids, Online, Puzzle
